issue.name: Cross-site scripting (reflected)
issue.issueBackground: Reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) arises when an application receives data in an HTTP request and includes that data within the immediate response in an unsafe way.
issue.remediationBackground: The primary defense against XSS is sanitizing user input.
issue.issueDetail: The value of the id parameter is reflected in the response without encoding.
issue.remediationDetail: Ensure that user input is properly encoded before being rendered in the response.
